Title: Navigation & Hyperdrive
Description: Learn how to navigate the galaxy and use your hyperdrive to jump between sectors.

Steps.Title: Introduction to Navigation
Steps.Message: The galaxy is vast! To explore efficiently, you'll need to master navigation and hyperdrive technology.

Steps.Title: Galaxy Map
Steps.Message:
Press M to open the Galaxy Map:
• View all sectors in the galaxy
• See sector coordinates (X, Y, Z)
• Tech levels shown by color (Iron to Avorion)
• Stations, asteroids, and ships marked
• Zoom and pan to explore

Steps.Title: Understanding Sectors
Steps.Message:
The galaxy is divided into sectors:
• Each sector has coordinates (X, Y, Z)
• Sectors contain asteroids, stations, and ships
• Tech level increases toward the galaxy center
• Higher tech = better materials and equipment
• Distance from center affects difficulty

Steps.Title: Hyperdrive System
Steps.Message:
The hyperdrive allows instant travel between sectors:
• Select a destination sector on the map
• Right-click or press Jump to initiate
• Hyperdrive charges for 5 seconds
• You can cancel during charge time
• Cooldown period after each jump

Steps.Title: Jump Range
Steps.Message:
Your hyperdrive has a limited jump range:
• Range shown as circle on galaxy map
• Upgrade your hyperdrive to increase range
• Energy cost increases with distance
• Plan multi-jump routes for distant sectors
• Some sectors may be unreachable until you upgrade

Steps.Title: Open the Galaxy Map
Steps.Message: Press M to open the Galaxy Map and explore the sectors around you.

Steps.Title: Navigation Complete!
Steps.Message: Excellent! You now know how to navigate the galaxy. Explore freely and discover what each sector has to offer!
